english_definition: Physical or mental effort or activity directed toward the production or accomplishment of something. It refers to employment, a job, or tasks that people do to earn money or achieve goals.
spanish_definition: Actividad física o mental que se realiza para producir algo o para obtener un resultado

english_definition: A legally or socially binding conceptual contract of entitlement to wealth, void of intrinsic value, payable for all debts and taxes, and regulated in supply.
spanish_definition: Medio de cambio generalmente aceptado que se utiliza para pagar bienes y servicios

english_definition: The indefinite continued progress of existence and events in the past, present, and future regarded as a whole. It is measured in seconds, minutes, hours, days, and years.
spanish_definition: Estado de la atmósfera en un momento y lugar determinados

english_definition: A group of people who are closely related to one another (by blood, marriage or adoption); kin; for example, a set of parents and their children; an immediate family.
spanish_definition: Grupo de personas unidas por vínculos de parentesco

english_definition: The place where one lives permanently, especially as a member of a family or household. It provides shelter, safety, and a sense of belonging and comfort.
spanish_definition: Lugar donde alguien vive y se siente seguro

english_definition: Any nutritious substance that people or animals eat or drink or that plants absorb in order to maintain life and growth. It provides energy and nutrients for the body.
spanish_definition: Alimento que se prepara para ser consumido

english_definition: A substance (of molecular formula H₂O) found at room temperature and pressure as a clear liquid; it is present naturally as rain, and found in rivers, lakes and seas; its solid form is ice and its gaseous form is steam.
spanish_definition: Sustancia líquida, transparente e incolora que es esencial para la vida

english_definition: A person other than a family member, spouse or lover whose company one enjoys and towards whom one feels affection.
spanish_definition: Persona con quien se tiene una relación de amistad

english_definition: An intense feeling of deep affection and care towards someone or something. It involves strong emotional attachment, compassion, and a desire to protect and nurture.
spanish_definition: Sentimiento intenso de afecto y cuidado hacia alguien

english_definition: The state of organisms preceding their death, characterized by biological processes such as metabolism and reproduction and distinguishing them from inanimate objects; the state of being alive and living.
spanish_definition: Existencia de un ser vivo desde su nacimiento hasta su muerte

english_definition: An institution for educating children or providing instruction in a particular subject. It's a place where students learn academic skills, social skills, and prepare for future careers.
spanish_definition: Institución donde se imparte educación formal

english_definition: A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.
spanish_definition: Conjunto de hojas impresas encuadernadas que forman una obra

english_definition: An electronic device that stores, retrieves, and processes data. It can perform calculations, run programs, connect to the internet, and help with various tasks.
spanish_definition: Dispositivo electrónico que procesa información

english_definition: A device for transmitting conversations and other sounds in real time across distances, now often a small portable unit also capable of running software etc.
spanish_definition: Dispositivo de comunicación a distancia

english_definition: A wheeled vehicle that moves independently, with at least three wheels, powered mechanically, steered by a driver and mostly for personal transportation.
spanish_definition: Vehículo con motor utilizado para transporte

english_definition: A building for human habitation, especially one that is lived in by a family or small group of people. It provides shelter from weather and a private living space.
spanish_definition: Edificio destinado a vivienda

english_definition: A woody perennial plant with a single main stem or trunk growing to a considerable height and bearing lateral branches. Trees produce oxygen and provide wood.
spanish_definition: Planta de tronco leñoso y ramas elevadas

english_definition: A colorful, conspicuous structure associated with angiosperms, frequently scented and attracting various insects, and which may or may not be used for sexual reproduction.
spanish_definition: Parte reproductiva de las plantas angiospermas

english_definition: In scientific usage, a multicellular organism that is usually mobile, whose cells are not encased in a rigid cell wall (distinguishing it from plants and fungi) and which derives energy solely from the consumption of other organisms (distinguishing it from plants).
spanish_definition: Ser vivo que se mueve por sí mismo y no es vegetal

english_definition: A human being regarded as an individual. Each person has unique characteristics, thoughts, feelings, and the ability to make choices.
spanish_definition: Ser humano individual

english_definition: A common English word that refers to day.
spanish_definition: Período de 24 horas en que la Tierra gira sobre su eje

english_definition: The period between sunset and sunrise, when a location faces far away from the sun, thus when the sky is dark.
spanish_definition: Período de oscuridad entre el atardecer y el amanecer

english_definition: A solar year, the time it takes the Earth to complete one revolution of the Sun (between 365.24 and 365.26 days depending on the point of reference).
spanish_definition: Período de 365 días en que la Tierra orbita alrededor del Sol

english_definition: A common English word that refers to month.
spanish_definition: Cada una de las doce divisiones del año

english_definition: A common English word that refers to week.
spanish_definition: Período de siete días

english_definition: A common English word that refers to hour.
spanish_definition: Unidad de tiempo equivalente a 60 minutos

english_definition: A common English word that refers to minute.
spanish_definition: Unidad de tiempo equivalente a 60 segundos

english_definition: A common English word that refers to second.
spanish_definition: Unidad básica de tiempo en el sistema internacional

english_definition: A common English word that refers to morning.
spanish_definition: Primera parte del día, desde el amanecer hasta el mediodía

english_definition: A common English word that refers to afternoon.
spanish_definition: Segunda parte del día, desde el mediodía hasta el atardecer

english_definition: A common English word that refers to evening.
spanish_definition: Período de oscuridad entre el atardecer y el amanecer

english_definition: A common English word that refers to today.
spanish_definition: Día presente

english_definition: A common English word that refers to tomorrow.
spanish_definition: Primera parte del día, desde el amanecer hasta el mediodía

english_definition: A common English word that refers to yesterday.
spanish_definition: Día anterior al presente

english_definition: A common English word that refers to sun.
spanish_definition: Estrella alrededor de la cual orbita la Tierra

english_definition: A common English word that refers to moon.
spanish_definition: Satélite natural de la Tierra

english_definition: Any small luminous dot appearing in the cloudless portion of the night sky, especially with a fixed location relative to other such dots.
spanish_definition: Cuerpo celeste que emite luz propia

english_definition: A common English word that refers to sky.
spanish_definition: Atmósfera vista desde la Tierra

english_definition: A common English word that refers to cloud.
spanish_definition: Masa visible de gotas de agua en la atmósfera

english_definition: A common English word that refers to rain.
spanish_definition: Precipitación de agua en forma de gotas desde la atmósfera

english_definition: A common English word that refers to snow.
spanish_definition: Precipitación de cristales de hielo desde la atmósfera

english_definition: A common English word that refers to wind.
spanish_definition: Movimiento del aire en la atmósfera

english_definition: The short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place, including the temperature, relative humidity, cloud cover, precipitation, wind, etc.
spanish_definition: Estado de la atmósfera en un momento y lugar determinados

english_definition: A common English word that refers to happy.
spanish_definition: Sentimiento de alegría y satisfacción

english_definition: A common English word that refers to sad.
spanish_definition: Sentimiento de melancolía y desánimo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to angry.
spanish_definition: Sentimiento de ira o enfado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to tired.
spanish_definition: Sensación de fatiga o agotamiento

english_definition: A common English word that refers to excited.
spanish_definition: Estado de ánimo con gran entusiasmo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to scared.
spanish_definition: Sensación de miedo o pánico

english_definition: A common English word that refers to beautiful.
spanish_definition: Que tiene belleza estética

english_definition: A common English word that refers to ugly.
spanish_definition: Que carece de belleza atractiva

english_definition: A common English word that refers to big.
spanish_definition: De tamaño considerable o importante

english_definition: Any part of something that is smaller or slimmer than the rest, now usually with anatomical reference to the back.
spanish_definition: De tamaño reducido o limitado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to hot.
spanish_definition: Que tiene alta temperatura

english_definition: A common English word that refers to cold.
spanish_definition: Que tiene baja temperatura

english_definition: A common English word that refers to good.
spanish_definition: Que tiene cualidades positivas o morales

english_definition: A common English word that refers to bad.
spanish_definition: Que tiene cualidades negativas o perjudiciales

english_definition: A common English word that refers to easy.
spanish_definition: Que no requiere gran esfuerzo o dificultad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to difficult.
spanish_definition: Que requiere gran esfuerzo o habilidad

english_definition: A train that calls at only some stations it passes between its origin and destination, typically just the principal stations
spanish_definition: Que se mueve o sucede a gran velocidad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to slow.
spanish_definition: Que se mueve o sucede a poca velocidad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to new.
spanish_definition: Que ha sido creado o hecho recientemente

english_definition: A common English word that refers to old.
spanish_definition: Que existe desde hace mucho tiempo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to young.
spanish_definition: Que está en la primera etapa de la vida

english_definition: A common English word that refers to healthy.
spanish_definition: Que contribuye al bienestar físico o mental

english_definition: A common English word that refers to sick.
spanish_definition: Que sufre alguna enfermedad o dolencia

english_definition: A common English word that refers to strong.
spanish_definition: Que tiene gran poder físico o resistencia

english_definition: A common English word that refers to weak.
spanish_definition: Que carece de fuerza o resistencia

english_definition: A common English word that refers to rich.
spanish_definition: Que posee gran cantidad de dinero o bienes

english_definition: A common English word that refers to poor.
spanish_definition: Que carece de recursos económicos suficientes

english_definition: A common English word that refers to important.
spanish_definition: Que tiene gran significado o relevancia

english_definition: To engage the attention of; to awaken interest in; to excite emotion or passion in, in behalf of a person or thing.
spanish_definition: Que capta la atención o curiosidad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to boring.
spanish_definition: Que no resulta entretenido o atractivo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to fun.
spanish_definition: Que causa entretenimiento o alegría

english_definition: A common English word that refers to serious.
spanish_definition: Que carece de humor o ligereza

english_definition: A common English word that refers to quiet.
spanish_definition: Que está en calma o sin agitación

english_definition: A common English word that refers to loud.
spanish_definition: Que produce mucho ruido

english_definition: A common English word that refers to clean.
spanish_definition: Que está libre de suciedad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to dirty.
spanish_definition: Que tiene suciedad o está contaminado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to empty.
spanish_definition: Que no contiene nada en su interior

english_definition: A common English word that refers to full.
spanish_definition: Que está completamente ocupado o contenido

english_definition: A common English word that refers to open.
spanish_definition: Que no está cerrado o sellado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to closed.
spanish_definition: Que está sellado o no permite el paso

english_definition: A common English word that refers to right.
spanish_definition: Que es adecuado o apropiado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to wrong.
spanish_definition: Que es inadecuado o equivocado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to true.
spanish_definition: Que corresponde a la realidad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to false.
spanish_definition: Que no corresponde a la realidad

english_definition: A common English word that refers to yes.
spanish_definition: Afirmación o confirmación

english_definition: A common English word that refers to no.
spanish_definition: Negación o rechazo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to please.
spanish_definition: Definición de por favor

english_definition: A common English word that refers to thank.
spanish_definition: Definición de gracias

english_definition: A common English word that refers to sorry.
spanish_definition: Definición de lo siento

english_definition: A common English word that refers to hello.
spanish_definition: Definición de hola

english_definition: A common English word that refers to goodbye.
spanish_definition: Definición de adiós

english_definition: A common English word that refers to help.
spanish_definition: Asistencia o apoyo para realizar algo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to problem.
spanish_definition: Situación difícil que requiere solución

english_definition: A common English word that refers to solution.
spanish_definition: Respuesta o resolución de un problema

english_definition: A common English word that refers to question.
spanish_definition: Interrogación que busca información

english_definition: A common English word that refers to answer.
spanish_definition: Información que responde a una pregunta

english_definition: A common English word that refers to information.
spanish_definition: Conjunto de datos organizados

english_definition: A common English word that refers to knowledge.
spanish_definition: Sabiduría o entendimiento adquirido

english_definition: The effect upon the judgment or feelings produced by any event, whether witnessed or participated in; personal and direct impressions as contrasted with description or fancies; personal acquaintance; actual enjoyment or suffering.
spanish_definition: Conocimiento adquirido por la práctica

english_definition: A common English word that refers to practice.
spanish_definition: Ejercicio repetido para mejorar habilidades

english_definition: Capacity to do something well; technique, ability. Skills are usually acquired or learned, as opposed to abilities, which are often thought of as innate.
spanish_definition: Capacidad para realizar algo bien

english_definition: A common English word that refers to ability.
spanish_definition: Potencial o aptitud para hacer algo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to talent.
spanish_definition: Habilidad natural o innata

english_definition: A common English word that refers to dream.
spanish_definition: Imaginación durante el sueño o deseo profundo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to hope.
spanish_definition: Confianza en que algo bueno sucederá

english_definition: A common English word that refers to wish.
spanish_definition: Anhelo o querer intensamente algo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to goal.
spanish_definition: Meta o propósito que se quiere alcanzar

english_definition: A drawing showing technical details of a building, machine, etc., with unwanted details omitted, and often using symbols rather than detailed drawing to represent doors, valves, etc.
spanish_definition: Estrategia o método organizado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to future.
spanish_definition: Tiempo que aún no ha llegado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to past.
spanish_definition: Tiempo que ya ha transcurrido

english_definition: A common English word that refers to present.
spanish_definition: Momento actual

english_definition: A common English word that refers to change.
spanish_definition: Modificación o transformación

english_definition: A common English word that refers to progress.
spanish_definition: Avance o mejora gradual

english_definition: A common English word that refers to success.
spanish_definition: Resultado favorable o logro

english_definition: A common English word that refers to failure.
spanish_definition: Resultado desfavorable o falta de éxito

english_definition: A common English word that refers to mistake.
spanish_definition: Equívoco o falta de corrección

english_definition: A common English word that refers to lesson.
spanish_definition: Enseñanza o aprendizaje obtenido

english_definition: A common English word that refers to opportunity.
spanish_definition: Momento favorable para hacer algo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to challenge.
spanish_definition: Prueba o dificultad que requiere esfuerzo

english_definition: The encountering of risks; a bold undertaking, in which dangers are likely to be encountered, and the issue is staked upon unforeseen events; a daring feat.
spanish_definition: Experiencia emocionante o arriesgada

english_definition: A common English word that refers to journey.
spanish_definition: Desplazamiento de un lugar a otro

english_definition: A common English word that refers to trip.
spanish_definition: Desplazamiento de un lugar a otro

english_definition: A common English word that refers to vacation.
spanish_definition: Período de descanso del trabajo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to holiday.
spanish_definition: Celebración o reunión social

english_definition: A common English word that refers to celebration.
spanish_definition: Acto de festejar o conmemorar

english_definition: A common English word that refers to party.
spanish_definition: Celebración o reunión social

english_definition: A common English word that refers to gift.
spanish_definition: Objeto dado voluntariamente a alguien

english_definition: A common English word that refers to surprise.
spanish_definition: Evento inesperado o imprevisto

english_definition: A common English word that refers to music.
spanish_definition: Arte de combinar sonidos de forma armoniosa

english_definition: A common English word that refers to song.
spanish_definition: Composición musical con letra

english_definition: A sequence of rhythmic steps or movements usually performed to music, for pleasure or as a form of social interaction.
spanish_definition: Movimiento rítmico del cuerpo

english_definition: A recorded sequence of images displayed on a screen at a rate sufficiently fast to create the appearance of motion.
spanish_definition: Obra cinematográfica o film

english_definition: A common English word that refers to game.
spanish_definition: Actividad recreativa con reglas

english_definition: Any activity that uses physical exertion or skills competitively under a set of rules that is not based on aesthetics.
spanish_definition: Actividad física competitiva

english_definition: A common English word that refers to exercise.
spanish_definition: Actividad física para mantener la salud

english_definition: A common English word that refers to health.
spanish_definition: Estado de bienestar físico y mental

english_definition: A physician; a member of the medical profession; one who is trained and licensed to heal the sick or injured. The final examination and qualification may award a doctor degree in which case the post-nominal letters are D.O., DPM, M.D., DMD, DDS, in the US or MBBS in the UK.
spanish_definition: Profesional de la medicina

english_definition: A common English word that refers to medicine.
spanish_definition: Ciencia y práctica de tratar enfermedades

english_definition: A large medical facility, usually in a building with multiple floors, where seriously ill or injured patients are given extensive medical and/or surgical treatment.
spanish_definition: Centro médico para tratar pacientes

english_definition: A common English word that refers to city.
spanish_definition: Centro urbano grande y poblado

english_definition: A settlement; an area with residential districts, shops and amenities, and its own local government; especially one larger than a village and smaller than a city.
spanish_definition: Centro urbano pequeño o rural

english_definition: A common English word that refers to country.
spanish_definition: Nación o territorio con gobierno propio

english_definition: A common English word that refers to world.
spanish_definition: Planeta Tierra o conjunto de todos los países

english_definition: A common English word that refers to earth.
spanish_definition: Planeta donde vivimos o suelo firme

english_definition: The natural world; that which consists of all things unaffected by or predating human technology, production, and design. (Compare ecosystem.)
spanish_definition: Conjunto de seres vivos y elementos naturales

english_definition: A common English word that refers to environment.
spanish_definition: Entorno o condiciones que rodean algo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to pollution.
spanish_definition: Deterioro del medio ambiente

english_definition: A common English word that refers to energy.
spanish_definition: Capacidad para realizar trabajo o producir cambios

english_definition: A common English word that refers to power.
spanish_definition: Autoridad o capacidad de influir

english_definition: Visible electromagnetic radiation. The human eye can typically detect radiation (light) in the wavelength range of about 400 to 750 nanometers. Nearby shorter and longer wavelength ranges, although not visible, are commonly called ultraviolet and infrared light.
spanish_definition: Radiación electromagnética visible

english_definition: A common English word that refers to dark.
spanish_definition: Que carece de luz o iluminación

english_definition: A common English word that refers to color.
spanish_definition: Propiedad visual de los objetos

english_definition: Any of a range of colours having the longest wavelengths, 670 nm, of the visible spectrum; a primary additive colour for transmitted light: the colour obtained by subtracting green and blue from white light using magenta and yellow filters; the colour of blood, ripe strawberries, etc.
spanish_definition: Color de la sangre o los tomates maduros

english_definition: The colour of the clear sky or the deep sea, between green and violet in the visible spectrum, and one of the primary additive colours for transmitted light; the colour obtained by subtracting red and green from white light using magenta and cyan filters; or any colour resembling this.
spanish_definition: Color del cielo o del mar profundo

english_definition: A common English word that refers to green.
spanish_definition: Color de la hierba o las hojas

english_definition: The colour of gold, butter, or a lemon; the colour obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light.
spanish_definition: Color del sol o los limones

english_definition: A common English word that refers to black.
spanish_definition: Color oscuro que absorbe toda la luz

english_definition: A common English word that refers to white.
spanish_definition: Color claro que refleja toda la luz

english_definition: A common English word that refers to orange.
spanish_definition: Color de la fruta del mismo nombre

english_definition: A common English word that refers to purple.
spanish_definition: Color mezcla de rojo y azul

english_definition: A common English word that refers to pink.
spanish_definition: Color claro similar al de algunas flores

english_definition: A common English word that refers to brown.
spanish_definition: Color de los granos de café tostado

english_definition: A common English word that refers to gray.
spanish_definition: Color intermedio entre blanco y negro
